hard_gates.name: permission-active-version-filter
hard_gates.evidence: No prohibited or superseded chunk was returned.

hard_gates.name: no-evidence-accuracy
hard_gates.evidence: Five of six held-out no-evidence cases returned no hit; fusion inherited one weak BM25 match.

hard_gates.name: source-judgments-resolved
hard_gates.evidence: All source and passage judgments resolve against the committed corpus.

hard_gates.name: sensitive-data-excluded
hard_gates.evidence: The corpus and queries are synthetic.

decision.rationale: Dense retrieval passed hard gates but regressed against BM25 on Recall@3 and nDCG@3; RRF improved coverage but failed no-evidence behavior and slightly regressed nDCG@3. No replacement is selected.
limitations: The synthetic corpus has forty chunks and one evaluator's judgments.
Only one English dense model and one RRF configuration were tested.
The calibration no-evidence slice did not include vocabulary-sharing out-of-domain questions.
ONNX native resident memory was not measured.
